name: research-copilot
description: AI-powered document analysis that runs 100% locally in your browser
author: Research Copilot Team

scripts.postinstall: node --input-type=module -e "import{readdirSync,readFileSync,writeFileSync,statSync}from'fs';import{join}from'path';function fix(d){try{for(const f of readdirSync(d)){const p=join(d,f);if(statSync(p).isDirectory()){fix(p)}else if(f.endsWith('.js')){const c=readFileSync(p,'utf-8');const n=c.replace(/\/\/# sourceMappingURL=.*$/gm,'');if(c!==n)writeFileSync(p,n)}}}catch{}}fix('node_modules/@runanywhere')"
